title: Corruption Replaces Warped Forests
description: since there's a crimson, why not have the corruption?
body:
Replaces warped wood, warped wart blocks, and warped nylium and foliage with Terraria corruption themed textures
![A Purple Forest in a red cavern](https://static.planetminecraft.com/files/image/minecraft/texture-pack/2024/652/17907154_l.webp)
